title: Craft Cobble Create! - legacy
description: Explore new, vibrant worlds with trains, planes, and ships! Encounter Cobblemon, build huge Create machines, and experience a richer end game!
body:
![craft cobble create logo overlayed on 2 by 2 grid of screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0bd75b4ed60fa17299270909ce8108d6e61e0a.jpeg)

# Craft

**Exciting New Worlds**

Lithosphere, Geophilic, Sky Villages, Immersive Aircraft and more come together to make the Overworld a thrill to explore!

**Vanilla+ Enhancements**

AppleSkin, Farmer's Delight, Deeper and Darker, Supplementaries and more! Quality of life and performance improvements are a pillar of this modpack :)

# Cobble

**Cobblemon - Pokemon in Minecraft!**

Ever dreamed that your favourite Pokemon could come along with you on your adventures in Minecraft? Now they can!

**Myths & Legends**

Battle legendary Cobblemon by finding artifacts and collecting blocks to spawn them! Check out the datapack wiki to learn more (quests will come in a later update): [Wiki](https://wiki.0skill.de/doku.php?id=start)

# Create

**Crafting on Another Level**

Build huge contraptions and crazy farms with the best machinery mod out there!

**Addons Galore**

Build crazy new machines and interact with more aspects of Minecraft with tons of great addons for Create, there's even new aircraft for Immersive Aircraft!

----

### Work-in-progress
- Quests (waiting for Odyssey Quests to be ported to 1.21)
- Interactive in-game key map & improved default key binds
- Server files (currently possible to create one by copying server-side mods to a NeoForge server)
- More mods! See the discord link below to suggest anything you think would be a great fit:

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/TFa82HB27p) for updates on the pack, discussions, community, and suggest features you'd like changed or added! This is my first modpack so any feedback is welcome :)

### Installation Notes

**RAM Allocation**
Memory allocation is recommended based on what your system has available, a pop-up will let you know when you launch. However, in testing the pack should run fine with 3-4GB. You may need to tweak some settings on lower-end hardware.
